_source: Compiled from NBS Nigeria Labour Force Survey (2024, revised methodology), national minimum wage act (2024), and public salary aggregates (Mysalaryscale, PayLab) — sector figures are national monthly estimates in naira.
unemploymentNote: Figures up to 2021 use the old NBS methodology (which counted anyone working under 20 hours/week as unemployed). In 2023 the NBS adopted the ILO international standard, which reports a much lower headline rate — so the sharp drop after 2021 is a change in how unemployment is measured, not a sudden jobs boom.
